qa_pairs.question: What are the initial steps to make the Ansys Additive Manufacturing ACT extension available for use in my project on a cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To make the Ansys Additive Manufacturing ACT extension available, you must first download the `AdditiveWizard.wbex` file from `https://catalog.ansys.com/` and then upload it to the cluster where it will be used. After that, start Ansys Workbench by following the graphical use instructions and open your project file (which ends in `.wbpj`) in the Workbench GUI.

qa_pairs.question: Once Ansys Workbench is running, how do I install and load the Additive Manufacturing ACT extension?
qa_pairs.answer: After starting Ansys Workbench and opening your project file, navigate to the ACT Start Page, click 'Manage Extensions' to open the Extension Manager. From there, click the box with the large '+' sign under the search bar to navigate and select your `AdditiveWizard.wbex` file to install it. To load the extension, click to highlight the AdditiveWizard box for the current session, or click the lower-right corner arrow and select 'Load extension' to load it for current and future sessions.
